channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LTTS] L&T Technology Services Submits FY26 Business Responsibility Report
item.description:
L&T Technology Services Ltd has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2025-26, as per Regulation 34(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This report is part of the Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26, which includes the Notice of the 14th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for June 1, 2026. The Integrated Annual Report is accessible on the company's website.

  • L&T Technology Services submits FY26 Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report.
  • Report is part of the Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26.
  • The 14th AGM is scheduled for June 1, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Integrated Annual Report is available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L&T Technology Services Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [LTTS] L&T Technology Services: Intimation for FY2025-26 Integrated Annual Report
item.description:
L&T Technology Services Ltd has announced the release of its Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26, including the Notice of the 14th Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM is scheduled for Monday, June 1, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. (IST) via Video Conferencing. The report and notice are being sent electronically to members with registered email addresses and are available on the company's website.

  • L&T Technology Services releases Integrated Annual Report for FY2025-26.
  • 14th Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 1, 2026, via video conference.
  • Report and AGM notice sent electronically to registered members.
  • Integrated Annual Report available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L&T Technology Services Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [EVEXIA] Evexia Lifecare Board Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Evexia Lifecare Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting on May 09, 2026. The auditor's report on the consolidated and standalone financial results is qualified, and a statement on the impact of audit qualifications is attached. The board meeting commenced at 7:00 p.m. and concluded at 9:45 p.m.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Auditor's report on financial results is qualified.
  • Meeting was held on May 09, 2026, starting at 7:00 p.m. and ending at 9:45 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Evexia Lifecare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EVEXIA] Evexia Lifecare Audited Financial Result for FY26
item.description:
Evexia Lifecare Limited announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, following a board meeting held on May 09, 2026. The results include both standalone and consolidated figures. The auditor's report on the consolidated and standalone financial results is qualified, with an attached statement on the impact of audit qualifications. The board meeting took place from 7:00 p.m. to 9:45 p.m.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) approved for FY26.
  • Auditor's report is qualified, impact statement attached.
  • Board meeting held on May 09, 2026, to approve results.
  • Standalone and consolidated statements of assets, liabilities, and cash flow included.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Evexia Lifecare Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LTTS] L&T Technology Services: 14th AGM Scheduled for June 1, 2026
item.description:
L&T Technology Services Ltd has announced its 14th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for June 1, 2026, to be held via video conferencing. The company has submitted the Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26, including the AGM notice, which is being sent electronically to members with registered email addresses. The report is also available on the company's website.

  • L&T Technology Services' 14th AGM will be held on June 1, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • The Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26, including the AGM notice, has been submitted.
  • The report is being sent electronically to members with registered email addresses.
  • The Integrated Annual Report is available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L&T Technology Services Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [SECMARK] SecMark Consultancy Board Meeting on 13/05/2026
item.description:
SecMark Consultancy Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SecMark Consultancy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HONASA] Honasa Consumer: Yatish Bhargava Resigns as CBO
item.description:
Yatish Bhargava, Chief Business Officer of Honasa Consumer Ltd, has resigned due to personal circumstances. His resignation will be effective from the close of business hours on May 15, 2026. The company has disclosed this change in senior management as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Yatish Bhargava resigns as Chief Business Officer of Honasa Consumer.
  • Resignation is due to personal circumstances.
  • Effective date of resignation is May 15, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Honasa Consumer Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [HUBTOWN] Hubtown Board Meeting on May 14, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Hubtown Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed for designated persons since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Hubtown Ltd's board will meet on May 14, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results.
  • The decision complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HUBTOWN LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WINDMACHIN] Windsor Machines Reappoints Internal and Cost Auditors
item.description:
Windsor Machines Ltd has re-appointed M/s. Moore Singhi Advisors LLP as Internal Auditor and M/s. Ashish Bhavsar & Associates as Cost Auditor for the year ending March 31, 2027. The decision was based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • M/s. Moore Singhi Advisors LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditor.
  • M/s. Ashish Bhavsar & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditor.
  • Re-appointments are for the year ending March 31, 2027.
  • Appointments follow SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Board's decision based on Audit Committee recommendation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WINDSOR MACHINES LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [WINDMACHIN] Windsor Machines Updates Key Managerial Personnel
item.description:
Windsor Machines Ltd. has updated its Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) details as per Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015. The Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 09, 2026, authorized and updated the details of KMPs for determining the materiality of events and information and for disclosures to the Stock Exchanges. The updated KMPs include Mr. Vinay Bansod (Whole Time Director & CEO), Mr. Anand Jain (Chief Financial Officer), and Mr. Rohit Sojitra (Company Secretary and Compliance Officer).

  • Windsor Machines updates KMP details as per SEBI regulations.
  • Board authorized KMP details in meeting on May 09, 2026.
  • Vinay Bansod (CEO), Anand Jain (CFO), and Rohit Sojitra (CS) are the KMPs.
  • KMPs are authorized for determining materiality of events.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WINDSOR MACHINES LTD. | Category: Corporate Governance
